← Back

Terms and Conditions

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}

1. Introduction

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the Greyline Accountants Ltd. website and services. By accessing or using our website or services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

2. About Us

Greyline Accountants Ltd. is a UK-based accounting firm providing professional accounting, tax, and financial advisory services to businesses, with a focus on agency and creative businesses.

3. Services

We provide the following services:

  • Bookkeeping and accounting services
  • Tax planning and preparation
  • Management reporting and financial analysis
  • CFO and financial advisory services
  • Strategic financial planning

Specific terms for each service will be outlined in separate service agreements or engagement letters.

4. Use of Website

You agree to use our website only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not:

  • Infringe the rights of others
  • Violate any applicable laws or regulations
  • Transmit any harmful or malicious code
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems

5. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of Greyline Accountants Ltd. or its licensors and is protected by UK and international copyright laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.

6. Client Responsibilities

As a client, you agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete information
  • Maintain records as required by law
  • Respond promptly to our requests for information
  • Pay fees as agreed in our service agreements
  • Comply with all applicable laws and regulations

7. Fees and Payment

Fees for our services will be agreed upon in writing before services commence. Payment terms will be specified in your service agreement. Late payments may incur interest charges and may result in suspension of services.

8. Confidentiality

We maintain strict confidentiality regarding all client information and business matters. We will not disclose confidential information except as required by law, with your consent, or as necessary to provide our services.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, our liability for any claims arising from our services is limited to the fees paid for the specific service in question. We are not liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages.

Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits our liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any other liability that cannot be excluded by law.

10. Professional Standards

We are regulated by professional accounting bodies and adhere to their codes of conduct and ethical standards. We maintain professional indemnity insurance as required.

11. Termination

Either party may terminate a service agreement with reasonable notice as specified in the agreement. Upon termination, you remain responsible for fees for services already provided.

12. Disputes

Any disputes arising from these Terms or our services will be resolved through good faith negotiation. If a resolution cannot be reached, disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

13. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this website. Your continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

14. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.

15. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with any service agreements or engagement letters, constitute the entire agreement between you and Greyline Accountants Ltd. regarding the use of our website and services.

16. Contact Information

For questions about these Terms, please contact us:

  • Email: hello@greylineaccountants.co.uk
  • Phone: +44 (0) 20 1234 5678
  • Address: Greyline Accountants Ltd., [Address], United Kingdom
